seoTitle: South Newdegate vs South Perth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Newdegate and South Perth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Newdegate vs South Perth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Newdegate and South Perth.
heading: South Newdegate vs South Perth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Newdegate, Western Australia and South Perth, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Newdegate has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Perth (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Newdegate or South Perth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Newdegate has a flood risk score of 34/100, while South Perth scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Newdegate scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. South Perth scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Newdegate or South Perth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Newdegate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
